textByHashes.74e2057ef17f8db8a213f323f73e266c9a726119: Yah, skinny man climb down vine the other day. Little man, big idiot! [laugh][laugh][laugh]...
textByHashes.69c0404bcd02182836f79d51bda5ab9827b45d5e: Arsen says he's very sorry for stealing from you. Here it is...
textByHashes.4fa0a7370fc3e6bee9f13100a3fb5d6b06cea52f: Yah, dat little man is big idiot. Climbed down vine, grabbed tooth-pick off Tess and ran away like scared kebbit.
textByHashes.538ad213dfcc2b13f30ec0f54262d1c4ed084aae: Dis is tooth-pick. Tess got plenty more. If skinny idiot man want Tess' old tooth-pick, maybe he sick in his head. But Tess not having shamans curse anyone.
textByHashes.a3aa7f7e060907856f61378f947d58eb6ff02b1f: Dis our home. It comfy, though we thinking of maybe getting more space up on land, above. But silly Corsair men live up there an' think dey own whole place.
textByHashes.ff56913f168ad0521165f25c2111386f6d140c79: Maybe one day dat gonna change. Tess got plans.
